debug_info.goal:
ι : Type u_1
Ω : Type u_2
E : Type u_3
inst✝⁴ : LinearOrder ι
inst✝³ : TopologicalSpace ι
inst✝² : NormedAddCommGroup E
inst✝¹ : NormedSpace ℝ E
inst✝ : CompleteSpace E
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
P : Measure Ω
X : ι → Ω → E
𝓕 : Filtration ι mΩ
hX : @ProbabilityTheory.IsSquareIntegrable ι Ω E inst✝⁴ inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ inst✝ mΩ X 𝓕 P
i j : ι
hij : i ≤ j
⊢ eLpNorm (X i) 2 P ≤ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P

failed_attempts:
have h_submart : Submartingale (fun k ω ↦ ‖X k ω‖ ^ 2) 𝓕 P :=
    hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  exact ENNReal.rpow_le_rpow (eLpNorm_mono_of_submartingale h_submart hij) (by norm_num)

have h_submart := hX.submartingale_sq_norm
  have h_int_i := hX.integrable_sq i
  have h_int_j := hX.integrable_sq j
  calc
    eLpNorm (X i) 2 P
      = (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (‖X i ω‖ ^ 2) ∂P) ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
        simp [eLpNorm, Real.rpow_def_of_nonneg]
    _ ≤ (∫⁻ ω, ENNReal.ofReal (‖X j ω‖ ^ 2) ∂P) ^ (1 / 2 : ℝ) := by
        gcongr
        exact h_submart.mono hij
    _ = eLpNorm (X j) 2 P := by
        simp [eLpNorm, Real.rpow_def_of_nonneg]
